channel.title: nxos on Christopher Hannan
channel.description: Recent content in nxos on Christopher Hannan

item.title: Cisco ACI - Converting NX-OS to ACI Boot Mode
item.description: Converting NX-OS to ACI Boot Mode Follow the steps below to convert a Cisco Nexus 9000 Series switch from NX-OS standalone mode to ACI boot mode. 1. Verify which mode the switch is running (ACI or NX-OS) Power on the new switch and connect a console to check if it is running in ACI mode or NX-OS mode. Cisco NX-OS filenames begin with “n9000” while ACI filenames begin with “aci-n9000”:
